description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build-linux, test-linux, build-macos, test-macos, and coverage-report. Use the ibmcom/swift-ubuntu:4.2 Docker image for the Linux jobs and define a cache for .build/checkouts, .build/dependencies-state.json, .build/repositories, and Package.resolved. In the build-linux job (stage build-linux) run `time swift build -c release`; in the test-linux job (stage test-linux) run `swift test`. In the build-macos job (stage build-macos, tag ios) run `time swift build -c release`; in the test-macos job (stage test-macos, tag ios) run `swift test -Xswiftc -target -Xswiftc x86_64-apple-macosx10.13`. In the coverage-report job (stage coverage-report, tag ios) run `echo "MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.13" > config.xcconfig`, `swift package generate-xcodeproj --enable-code-coverage --xcconfig-overrides config.xcconfig`, `xcodebuild -project SlackHook.xcodeproj -scheme SlackHook-Package -derivedDataPath Build/ clean build test`, and finally `zsh -c "xcrun xccov view --only-targets Build/Logs/Test/**/*.xccovreport"`. Set the variable IMAGE_TAG to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG.
